name: finmind
description: Fetch financial data and generate AI analysis summaries for stocks, with single-stock analysis and multi-stock comparison.
intent_triggers: 分析一下蘋果股票的財務數據
幫我比較幾檔股票的淨利率
查一下 TSLA 的本益比和 ROE
看一下 MSFT 的財務指標
compare net margins of AAPL and MSFT
fetch stock data and generate analysis
show me the P/E ratio for Tesla
幫我跑 finmind 分析 AAPL 並輸出 JSON

format.description: Output format: table, json, or text

symbols.description: List of stock symbols for comparison

metric.description: Comparison metric: net_margin, roe, pe_ratio, or debt_ratio

examples.intent: 分析單一股票的財務數據
分析並輸出 JSON 報告

examples.invocation: finmind compare AAPL MSFT TSLA -m roe

error_codes.1: Stock symbol not found or unsupported
